pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 2.7.5, which is compatible with and recommended for Java 17.
Define the main application class explicitly to ensure correct execution in the new environment.
Update the internal common test library to version 3.0.1.
Enable deprecation warnings and Xlint in the Maven compiler plugin to improve code quality visibility.
Configure the Spring Boot Maven plugin to use a specific classifier for the repackaged jar.
Update Docker build resource includes to match the new jar filename pattern generated by the classifier.
Increment the project version revision to 7.0.0 to reflect the major migration.

.drone.yml.general_idea: Comment out the git-tag-stage step, likely due to troubleshooting or deprecation of this specific tagging strategy.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the Drone CI build status badge URL with the AWS CodeBuild badge URL to reflect the migration of the CI/CD pipeline.
README.md.human_impl: Changed markdown image source from `https://drone.cloudtrain.aws.msgoat.eu/...` to `https://codebuild.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com/...`

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove the deprecated or unnecessary MetaspaceSize JVM flag which is no longer required or recommended in the new JDK context.
Add a new environment variable placeholder for agent-specific Java options.

src/main/docker/docker-entrypoint.sh.general_idea: Added logging for the AGENT_JAVA_OPTS environment variable to aid in debugging Java agent configurations.
Included AGENT_JAVA_OPTS in the java command line arguments to support Java agents (e.g., for monitoring or tracing).
Removed the explicit JAVA_APPLICATION variable from logging and usage, likely because it is no longer needed or is derived differently.
Changed the jar file argument from a specific filename to a wildcard pattern to handle versioned jar names automatically.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Disable ANSI color codes in log output to ensure compatibility with environments that do not support them.
Limit exposed actuator endpoints to a specific safe subset instead of exposing all endpoints.
Enable Kubernetes-style liveness and readiness probes via the health endpoint.
Configure Jackson to exclude null values from JSON serialization output.

src/test/docker/cnj-hello-backend-spring.general_idea: Renamed the environment variable for JaCoCo agent options to avoid conflicts with standard JAVA_OPTS usage.
Added explicit JVM memory settings via a new environment variable to ensure stable runtime behavior.

src/test/resources/META-INF/test-config..general_idea: Update the readiness probe path to use the dedicated /actuator/health/readiness endpoint introduced in Spring Boot 2.6+.
